title: Mock tests use .unwrap() without context which is fine for test code
description:
lichen-embassy/src/mock.rs tests (lines 225-255) use .unwrap() consistently.

This is **correct** for test code. Noting for completeness — no action needed. Tests should use .unwrap() for brevity; stack traces identify failure points.
